spec.name: EchoShatter
spec.summary: A reality-altering effect that disrupts raw energy in a field volume by changing existing conditions
spec.effect_description: Invokes a fundamental disruption to local Flux architecture. The caster inscribes a sigil that disrupts raw energy in a field volume by changing existing conditions. Effect range: line-of-sight. Persistence: permanent. Side effects on caster and casting site are documented but not fully understood.
spec.notes: Pale-class spell - use with extreme caution

all_grimoire_row: | **EchoShatter** | Circle | Counter | Affect | T5 | Raw | Raw | Field | Line-of-Sight | Permanent | Surface |
